heading: Meet the Explorers
subheading: Your brave guides through God's Word

explorers.name: Ellie
explorers.verse: "Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid." — Joshua 1:9
explorers.bio: Ellie is the thoughtful, gentle leader of the group. She never forgets a Bible verse — elephants never forget! She encourages her friends when things get tough.

explorers.name: Giraffy
explorers.verse: "I lift up my eyes to the mountains — where does my help come from?" — Psalm 121:1
explorers.bio: Giraffy can see farther than anyone! She spots trouble before it arrives and always looks to God for help. Her long neck keeps her head above the clouds.

explorers.name: Stripes
explorers.verse: "The Lord is my strength and my shield." — Psalm 28:7
explorers.bio: Stripes is bold, fast, and always ready for adventure! Sometimes a little too eager, he is learning to pause and pray before leaping into action.

explorers.name: Hippo
explorers.verse: "A friend loves at all times." — Proverbs 17:17
explorers.bio: Hippo may be big, but he has the biggest heart on the team. He is always the first to share his snacks, lend a hand, or give a hug when someone is sad.
